understanding.goal_understanding: Reach the goal gem tile marked '+' by navigating through levels while avoiding spikes, using horizontal movement and gravity-based falling.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement is horizontal only via MOVE_LEFT or MOVE_RIGHT, after which gravity automatically pulls you until landing on a solid tile or hazard. CLICK removes breakable blocks (x). Spikes (u/v) end the run immediately upon landing. UNDO reverts the last action. Gravity direction (DOWN/UP) determines fall direction, and corridor_scan/left_landing/right_landing help preview safe landing spots.
